name: Stripe
description: Developer-first payments infrastructure for internet businesses. Provides APIs for payments, billing, and financial services.

name: Plaid
description: API platform that connects fintech applications to users' bank accounts. Enables open banking and financial data access.

name: Segment
description: Customer data infrastructure platform acquired by Twilio. Provides APIs and integrations for collecting, routing, and managing customer data.

name: Marqeta
description: Modern card issuing and payment processing platform. Powers card programs for Square, DoorDash, and other fintechs via open APIs.

name: Mercury
description: Banking platform built for startups and scaling companies. Offers checking, savings, credit cards, and treasury management.

name: HashiCorp
description: Cloud infrastructure automation company acquired by IBM. Products include Terraform, Vault, Consul, and Nomad for multi-cloud management.

name: Fivetran
description: Automated data integration platform. Provides pre-built connectors to sync data from SaaS apps, databases, and APIs into data warehouses.

name: Postman
description: API development and collaboration platform used by over 30 million developers. Provides tools for designing, testing, and documenting APIs.

name: Supercell
description: Mobile gaming studio behind Clash of Clans, Clash Royale, and Brawl Stars. Acquired by Tencent for $8.6B in 2016.

name: Alchemy
description: Blockchain developer platform powering top Web3 apps. Provides APIs, SDKs, and infrastructure for building on Ethereum, Polygon, and other chains.

name: Alloy
description: Identity decisioning platform for banks and fintech companies. Automates KYC/AML compliance, fraud prevention, and credit underwriting.

name: Confluent
description: Data streaming platform built on Apache Kafka. Enables real-time event streaming infrastructure for enterprise applications.

name: BeReal
description: Social media app encouraging authentic sharing with daily prompts to capture unfiltered moments. Acquired by Voodoo in 2024.

name: Ramp
description: Corporate card and spend management platform that helps businesses save money. Offers expense management, bill pay, and accounting automation.

name: Databricks
description: Unified analytics and AI platform built on Apache Spark. Provides data lakehouse architecture for data engineering, science, and ML.

name: Snyk
description: Developer security platform that finds and fixes vulnerabilities in code, dependencies, containers, and infrastructure as code.

name: Thought Machine
description: Cloud-native core banking platform powering next-gen banks and financial institutions. Full-stack infrastructure with smart contract ledger.

name: Lemon8
description: Lifestyle content sharing platform by ByteDance combining Instagram-style photos with Pinterest-like discovery. Growing in US and Asia markets.

name: Wave
description: Free invoicing, accounting, and receipt scanning platform for small businesses. Acquired by H&R Block for $537M in 2019.

name: GitLab
description: Complete DevSecOps platform delivered as a single application. Provides CI/CD, source code management, and security testing.

name: Moov Financial
description: Open-source money movement API for fintech developers. Enables ACH, card processing, and wallet infrastructure via embedded finance APIs.

name: Merge
description: Unified API platform for B2B integrations. Single API to add hundreds of HR, ATS, accounting, CRM, and ticketing integrations.

name: Scopely
description: Mobile-first gaming company behind Marvel Strike Force and Monopoly GO. Acquired by Savvy Games Group for $4.9B in 2023.

name: Hippo Insurance
description: Insurtech company modernizing home insurance with smart home monitoring, proactive protection, and streamlined digital claims processing.

name: Persona
description: Identity verification and KYC platform for businesses. Provides document verification, database checks, and fraud detection APIs.

name: Airtable
description: Cloud collaboration and database platform that enables teams to build custom workflows and applications without code.

name: Brex
description: Corporate card and spend management platform for startups and enterprises. Offers financial services and expense automation.

name: Carta
description: Equity management and cap table infrastructure platform used by startups, venture firms, and private companies.
